programme.desc: Film following Nasa psychologist Dr Al Holland as he prepares Mars-bound astronauts for the psychological demands of a three-year absence from Earth.

programme.title: The Race to Mars: Tomorrow's World
programme.desc: First transmitted in 1987, what is the future of manned space flight one year after the US Challenger disaster?

programme.title: Face the Music
programme.desc: Joseph Cooper invites viewers to match their musical wits against guests Joyce Grenfell, Richard Baker and Robin Ray. With guest musician Lina Lalandi.

programme.title: Meet the Ancestors
programme.desc: 2/6. Archaeologist Julian Richards joins an excavation team as they uncover a rare find from a fourth-century Roman cemetery in Winchester: a lead coffin.

programme.title: Art of Persia
programme.desc: 3/3. Samira Ahmed goes back to when Persia faced her gravest threat, Genghis Khan, and reveals how the Safavids, who succeeded the Mongols, give Iran a powerful new identity.

programme.desc: Programmes start at 7.00pm.

programme.title: Great British Railway Journeys
programme.desc: 7/15. Michael Portillo continues his railway exploration of the postwar Britain of his youth on a journey from London to Cambridge, starting at South Bank.

programme.title: Coastal Path
programme.desc: 1/5. Explorer Paul Rose sets off on the walk of a lifetime - 630 miles of the South West Coast Path, discovering wildlife, wild traditions and wild adventure along the way.

programme.title: Yes, Prime Minister
programme.desc: 6/8. Classic political sitcom. Jim Hacker faces embarrassment when Sir Humphrey tells a bigwig friend in the arts that the government is planning to cut grants.

programme.title: Yes, Prime Minister
programme.desc: 7/8. Jim Hacker decides to abolish the Department of Education and Science to reduce bureaucracy and save money, giving cash directly to schools. Sir Humphrey, of course, is appalled.

programme.title: Queen Elizabeth I: A Timewatch Guide
programme.desc: 3/4. Using 60 years of BBC archive, Vanessa Collingridge examines the life of Elizabeth Tudor.

programme.title: Price of Gold - Storyville
programme.desc: A Storyville documentary that revisits the 1994 scandal that embroiled competing US Olympic figure skaters Nancy Kerrigan and Tonya Harding.

programme.title: The Great American Buffalo
programme.desc: 2/2. By the late 1880s, the buffalo teeter on the brink of extinction.

programme.title: Great British Railway Journeys

programme.title: Coastal Path

programme.title: Wild China
programme.desc: 3/6. Series about the creatures that live in China's most beautiful landscapes. This episode looks at the remote Tibetan Plateau, home to chiru antelopes, wild yaks and bears.

programme.title: Brian Cox's Adventures in Space and Time

programme.title: Tribe

programme.title: Smiley's People

programme.desc: ...Andrew Marr's Paperback Heroes. 3/3. How the spy novel allows readers to engage with big questions about the human condition.

programme.desc: Mother's Melody. Stop-motion animation. Tiny Clanger suggests that Mother Clanger composes a tune to play with the singing flowers in the garden.

programme.title: BeddyByes
programme.desc: Hug. MeMo and BaBa play with a cuddly teddy bear and all their BeddyByes friends. They discover that when you are feeling sad, sometimes all you need is a hug to make things better.

programme.title: In the Night Garden
programme.desc: What Loud Music, Tombliboos! Children's programme. The Tombliboos play music very loudly, and Makka Pakka has to use his trumpet through Upsy Daisy's megaphone to be heard.

programme.title: CBeebies Bedtime Stories
programme.desc: Rachel Zegler - Never Mess With a Pirate Princess. Rachel Zegler shares a magical story about a powerful princess.

programme.title: Catching a Killer
programme.desc: Buried Truths: When Cumali Turhan is reported missing, Essex Police suspect foul play. And when a witness sees Turhan's body thrown out with the rubbish, a murder enquiry begins.

programme.title: 999: What Happened Next
programme.desc: A car is in flames. A thief is fatally stabbed. A 999 call comes in and an investigation begins. But if nothing is what it first seems, can the police bring the guilty to justice? (Ep1)

programme.title: New: Walter Presents: The Pushover
programme.desc: Danish thriller. A North Zealand police inspector and a Copenhagen journalist follow separate leads towards chilling secrets when a conman is implicated in a murder. In Danish/subs. (Ep1)

programme.title: Ramsay's Hotel Hell
programme.desc: Hotel Chester: Gordon visits Mississippi to rescue the failing Hotel Chester. The owner has 40 years' experience in the hotel industry but is struggling to make things work.

programme.title: David Baddiel: Cat Man
programme.desc: David challenges the notion that cats aren't a guy thing, meets some life-saving cats and explores the ways we can honour our feline family members. (Ep3/3)

programme.title: Kirstie and Phil's Love It or...
programme.desc: ...List It: Kirstie revisits Julie and Allen, who decided to list their house and move to a home next to Allen's favourite pub. But did they follow through on their decision?

programme.title: Cheers

programme.title: Cheers

programme.title: Everybody Loves Raymond

programme.title: Everybody Loves Raymond

programme.title: Everybody Loves Raymond

programme.title: Frasier

programme.desc: Coots and Ladders: Frasier feels guilty after resorting to crime to spice up his life, but his attempts to put things straight have embarrassing consequences.

programme.title: Frasier
programme.desc: Match Game: Frasier hires an attractive professional matchmaker (guest star Laura Linney) but ends up on a string of bad dates. Meanwhile, Niles and Daphne plan a natural birth.

programme.title: Peppa Pig
programme.desc: Mummy and Daddy Pig are working in their home office. Peppa wants to 'work' like them too, so she creates her own office in the cupboard under the stairs to do lots of work.

programme.title: New: Tim Rex in Space
programme.desc: When Tim finds Blobert, an old toy, it brings out the monster in him.

programme.title: Stan & Gran
programme.desc: Heart-warming animated preschool series. Grandad's gnomes go missing. The mystery deepens when Stan finds a tiny human handprint! The gnomes can't really have come to life, can they?!

programme.title: New: PAW Patrol
programme.desc: Alien Easter eggs cause trouble in Adventure Bay.

programme.title: Milo
programme.desc: When a muddy Farmer Tilly visits Scrubby's, Milo, Lofty and Lark think it would be amazing to be down on the farm with the animals. But their fun time soon turns to chaos!

programme.title: Ben and Holly's Little Kingdom
programme.desc: Holly goes with Ben and Mr Elf to the farm to collect an egg for the Kingdom's breakfast. But a huge chicken escapes from the farm so Holly and the elves have to chase it.

programme.title: Peppa Pig
programme.desc: To celebrate Freddy Fox's birthday, the children go on a trip to a Dinosaur Park.

programme.title: Odo
programme.desc: While deep in the woods on a nature trek, the campers are caught in a windstorm and have to quickly build a sturdy shelter.

programme.title: New: Milkshake! Love Nature Young Voices
programme.desc: While playing playing a game in the woods, three children find a centipede. They decide to build a new home for it with leaves, twigs, and moss.

programme.title: PAWsome Puzzles
programme.desc: Help the PAW Patrol solve games, puzzles, and brainteasers in these mini-missions. (Ep9)

programme.title: Milkshake! Story Den
programme.desc: Kiera reads a story about Farah who visits her Grandpa every summer to pick the ripe fruit. However, this year, the tree is empty! But Farah is determined to help the tree grow mangos.

programme.title: Jeremy Vine
programme.desc: Start the day with a dose of hard-hitting debate, your phone calls and a little fun - all driven by Jeremy's unique style.

programme.title: Storm & Alexis

programme.title: 5 News at Lunchtime
programme.desc: National and international news.

programme.title: Matt Allwright
programme.desc: Matt looks at the big news stories developing during the day and offers help and advice to save you money and make your lives a little easier.

programme.title: Vanessa
programme.desc: Raw, unfiltered, authentic and personal, Vanessa Feltz wants you to tell her what's on your mind. Fiery discussions, a good giggle and plenty of afternoon gossip!

programme.title: The Madame Blanc Mysteries
programme.desc: Jean becomes embroiled in a mystery after she is contacted by a couple who believe they possess the original blueprints of the capital city of Malta but are subjected to an attack.

programme.title: New: Bargain-Loving Brits in the Sun
programme.desc: Val races to prep her Halloween disco, Adrian and Debbie hope their Turaco finds love, Paige performs for care home residents, and Frank makes a big sacrifice for charity.

programme.title: 5 News at 5
programme.desc: Join Dan Walker and the team for the news that matters to you.

programme.title: New: Love Nature
programme.desc: Red Kites were once a thriving species in Northern Ireland but due to disruption of their precious habitats, the bird went extinct. But conservationists have reintroduced the species.

programme.title: The Motorway
programme.desc: Gavin and Ryan deal with a vehicle that's smashed into the central reservation of the M62. Vicky and Steve receive reports of a badger crossing the Manchester ship canal via the M6.

programme.title: The Underground Map of Britain
programme.desc: An entertaining, fact-fuelled ride through London's tube, revealing the history of the world's first - and iconic - underground railway, which carries 1.3 billion passengers a year.

programme.title: New: Spain with Michael Portillo
programme.desc: Michael travels to Mallorca, venturing to the top of capital Palma's Gothic Cathedral, before heading to the beautiful town of Soller, enjoying local delicacies and harvesting almonds. (Ep5)

programme.title: New: Ben Fogle: New Lives in the Wild
programme.desc: Ben tries out a different kind of wild living - 'continuous cruising' on a narrowboat - staying with Dave, whose move off-grid on canals became a lifeline after a tragedy.

programme.title: A Killer Makes a Call: The Canterbury Murders
programme.desc: A panicked 999 call comes in from a man called Foster Christian, claiming he is being attacked in his own home. But, survivor statements tell a very story...

programme.title: News
programme.desc: The leading news stories of the moment.

programme.title: News
programme.desc: The leading news stories of the moment.

programme.title: Chevalier
programme.desc: (2022) Exuberant historical costume drama. Kelvin Harrison Jr stars as prodigiously talented French-Caribbean swordsman and composer Joseph Bologne, who literally out-fiddled Mozart.

programme.title: Blue Bayou
programme.desc: (2021) Justin Chon's poignant drama about a man of Korean descent who is threatened with deportation from the US even though he was adopted into an American family when he was three.

programme.title: Teleshopping
programme.desc: Teleshopping.

programme.title: Teleshopping
programme.desc: Teleshopping.

programme.title: Santa Fe
programme.desc: (1951) Western starring Randolph Scott. Four brothers leave the defeated South to seek jobs as the US recovers from the Civil War. As one becomes a railwayman, the others turn to crime.

programme.title: The Black Arrow
programme.desc: (1948) Historical adventure. A man (Louis Hayward) returns from the Wars of the Roses to learn from his uncle that a family friend has killed his father. But is everything as it seems?

programme.title: To Hell and Back
programme.desc: (1955) Fact-based wartime drama. Audie Murphy, America's most decorated soldier in WWII, plays himself in this dramatic recreation of the valiant heroics that earned him the honours.

programme.title: Censor Interview Special
programme.desc: Star Niamh Algar and director Prano Bailey-Bond talk about making their new psychological horror film, Censor.

programme.title: Canyon Passage
programme.desc: (1946) Frontier western starring Dana Andrews. An ambitious businessman journeys to rural Oregon where a complex web of life and love waits to ensnare him. Directed by Jacques Tourneur.

programme.title: Legends of the Fall
programme.desc: (1994) Oscar-winning turn-of-the-century drama with Brad Pitt and Anthony Hopkins. A Montana patriarch's son falls for his brother's fiancée, setting off a tragic chain of events.

programme.title: A Man Called Otto
programme.desc: (2022) Darkly-tinged but ultimately feel-good comedy starring Tom Hanks as a grumpy misanthrope who spends his time badgering people into following society's rules. But why is he like this?

programme.title: Our Kind of Traitor
programme.desc: (2014) Thriller about a British couple who get drawn into a Russian mafia conspiracy. With Ewan McGregor, Naomie Harris, Stellan Skarsgård and Damian Lewis. Based on John le Carré's novel.

programme.title: Night of the 12th
programme.desc: (2022) Award-winning, gritty true-crime drama following a faltering police investigation into the grisly murder of a young woman. With Bastien Bouillon and Bouli Lanners. In French/subs.

programme.title: Teleshopping
programme.desc: Teleshopping.

programme.title: Teleshopping
programme.desc: Teleshopping.

programme.title: The Shepherd of the Hills
programme.desc: (1941) John Wayne stars as a moody young man living in the Ozarks who has sworn revenge on his long-absent father for deserting his mother. Then a kindly stranger appears on the scene...

programme.title: The Mouse That Roared
programme.desc: (1959) Satirical comedy starring Peter Sellers (in a triple role) and the original Doctor Who, William Hartnell. The world's smallest state, Grand Fenwick, declares war on the USA.

programme.title: They Rode West
programme.desc: (1954) Tough western. A cavalry doctor (Robert Francis) discovers a Native American tribe is dying of malaria, but his by-the-book captain (Phil Carey) refuses to allow their treatment.

programme.title: Shenandoah
programme.desc: (1965) Western. James Stewart stars as a wealthy Virginia farming patriarch trying to keep his family together and safe in the midst of the encroaching American Civil War.

programme.title: Oblivion
programme.desc: (2013) Sci-fi action-mystery set on a war-ravaged planet Earth that's been largely abandoned by humanity. With Tom Cruise, Andrea Riseborough, Olga Kurylenko and Morgan Freeman.

programme.title: Beau Is Afraid
programme.desc: (2023) Joaquin Phoenix stars in Ari Aster's fantastical odyssey about an anxiety-riddled man-boy working his way through a variety of psychological horrors to visit his domineering mother.

programme.title: Public Enemies
programme.desc: (2009) Michael Mann directs Johnny Depp as infamous bank robber John Dillinger; Marion Cotillard as Dillinger's sorta girl; and Christian Bale as the FBI agent trying to put him away.

programme.title: Teleshopping
programme.desc: Teleshopping.

programme.title: Teleshopping
programme.desc: Teleshopping.

programme.title: Local Hero
programme.desc: (1983) Comedy starring Peter Riegert, Burt Lancaster and Peter Capaldi. A US oil company executive tries to persuade a small Scottish seaside community to sell up their entire village.

programme.title: Hail the Conquering Hero
programme.desc: (1944) Satirical wartime comedy starring Eddie Bracken as a man who becomes a celebrated war hero despite having been medically discharged from the marines after only a few weeks.

programme.title: Gun Fury
programme.desc: (1953) Western. Rock Hudson stars as a California-bound settler who must ride 1500 miles to the Mexican border to rescue his fiancée (Donna Reed) after she's abducted by an outlaw.

programme.title: Jason and the Argonauts
programme.desc: (1963) Classic interpretation of the Greek myth of Jason's quest to find the Golden Fleece, boasting the enduring work of special effects maestro Ray Harryhausen. Directed by Don Chaffey.

programme.title: Moon
programme.desc: (2009) Psychological sci-fi thriller. Sam Rockwell stars as a man who lives alone on the moon overseeing a mining operation. His time's nearly done, but he's started to go a bit peculiar...

programme.title: The Pope's Exorcist
programme.desc: (2023) Supernatural horror starring Russell Crowe, loosely based on the memoirs of a 'real' exorcist. A case of demonic possession in Spain connects to dark secrets from the Inquisition.

programme.title: S.W.A.T.
programme.desc: (2003) Action with Colin Farrell and Samuel L Jackson. A loose canon joins an elite force to escort a fugitive to chokey. But the baddie's put a reward out for help with his escape.

programme.title: Knock at the Cabin
programme.desc: (2023) M Night Shyamalan's jarringly intimate end-of-days horror with Dave Bautista. An armed group insist that a family of three must make an impossible life-or-death choice.

programme.title: Chevalier
programme.desc: (2022) Exuberant historical costume drama. Kelvin Harrison Jr stars as prodigiously talented French-Caribbean swordsman and composer Joseph Bologne, who literally out-fiddled Mozart.

programme.title: Blue Bayou
programme.desc: (2021) Justin Chon's poignant drama about a man of Korean descent who is threatened with deportation from the US even though he was adopted into an American family when he was three.

programme.desc: Teleshopping.

programme.title: Censor Interview Special
programme.desc: Star Niamh Algar and director Prano Bailey-Bond talk about making their new psychological horror film, Censor.

programme.title: Canyon Passage
programme.desc: (1946) Frontier western starring Dana Andrews. An ambitious businessman journeys to rural Oregon where a complex web of life and love waits to ensnare him. Directed by Jacques Tourneur.

programme.title: Legends of the Fall
programme.desc: (1994) Oscar-winning turn-of-the-century drama with Brad Pitt and Anthony Hopkins. A Montana patriarch's son falls for his brother's fiancée, setting off a tragic chain of events.

programme.title: A Man Called Otto
programme.desc: (2022) Darkly-tinged but ultimately feel-good comedy starring Tom Hanks as a grumpy misanthrope who spends his time badgering people into following society's rules. But why is he like this?

programme.title: Our Kind of Traitor
programme.desc: (2014) Thriller about a British couple who get drawn into a Russian mafia conspiracy. With Ewan McGregor, Naomie Harris, Stellan Skarsgård and Damian Lewis. Based on John le Carré's novel.

programme.title: Night of the 12th
programme.desc: (2022) Award-winning, gritty true-crime drama following a faltering police investigation into the grisly murder of a young woman. With Bastien Bouillon and Bouli Lanners. In French/subs.

programme.title: Teleshopping
programme.desc: Teleshopping.

programme.title: Teleshopping
programme.desc: Teleshopping.

programme.title: The Shepherd of the Hills
programme.desc: (1941) John Wayne stars as a moody young man living in the Ozarks who has sworn revenge on his long-absent father for deserting his mother. Then a kindly stranger appears on the scene...

programme.title: The Mouse That Roared
programme.desc: (1959) Satirical comedy starring Peter Sellers (in a triple role) and the original Doctor Who, William Hartnell. The world's smallest state, Grand Fenwick, declares war on the USA.

programme.title: They Rode West
programme.desc: (1954) Tough western. A cavalry doctor (Robert Francis) discovers a Native American tribe is dying of malaria, but his by-the-book captain (Phil Carey) refuses to allow their treatment.

programme.title: Shenandoah
programme.desc: (1965) Western. James Stewart stars as a wealthy Virginia farming patriarch trying to keep his family together and safe in the midst of the encroaching American Civil War.

programme.title: Oblivion
programme.desc: (2013) Sci-fi action-mystery set on a war-ravaged planet Earth that's been largely abandoned by humanity. With Tom Cruise, Andrea Riseborough, Olga Kurylenko and Morgan Freeman.

programme.title: Beau Is Afraid
programme.desc: (2023) Joaquin Phoenix stars in Ari Aster's fantastical odyssey about an anxiety-riddled man-boy working his way through a variety of psychological horrors to visit his domineering mother.

programme.title: Public Enemies
programme.desc: (2009) Michael Mann directs Johnny Depp as infamous bank robber John Dillinger; Marion Cotillard as Dillinger's sorta girl; and Christian Bale as the FBI agent trying to put him away.

programme.title: Teleshopping
programme.desc: Teleshopping.

programme.title: Teleshopping
programme.desc: Teleshopping.

programme.title: Local Hero
programme.desc: (1983) Comedy starring Peter Riegert, Burt Lancaster and Peter Capaldi. A US oil company executive tries to persuade a small Scottish seaside community to sell up their entire village.

programme.title: Hail the Conquering Hero
programme.desc: (1944) Satirical wartime comedy starring Eddie Bracken as a man who becomes a celebrated war hero despite having been medically discharged from the marines after only a few weeks.

programme.title: Gun Fury
programme.desc: (1953) Western. Rock Hudson stars as a California-bound settler who must ride 1500 miles to the Mexican border to rescue his fiancée (Donna Reed) after she's abducted by an outlaw.

programme.title: Jason and the Argonauts
programme.desc: (1963) Classic interpretation of the Greek myth of Jason's quest to find the Golden Fleece, boasting the enduring work of special effects maestro Ray Harryhausen. Directed by Don Chaffey.

programme.title: Moon
programme.desc: (2009) Psychological sci-fi thriller. Sam Rockwell stars as a man who lives alone on the moon overseeing a mining operation. His time's nearly done, but he's started to go a bit peculiar...

programme.title: The Pope's Exorcist
programme.desc: (2023) Supernatural horror starring Russell Crowe, loosely based on the memoirs of a 'real' exorcist. A case of demonic possession in Spain connects to dark secrets from the Inquisition.

programme.desc: It's the semi-final, and two teams compete in a sudden death cook-off. Their task is to cook a 3-course dinner to impress a table of Kiwi comedians - and it's no laughing matter.

programme.title: Pete Wicks: For Dogs' Sake
programme.desc: Crumble's Big Adventure: Pete meets Staffy Boxer Cross Crumble, who's been at the centre in Basildon for over three years, stuck without a foster or permanent home in sight.

programme.title: Louis Theroux: Shooting Joe Exotic
programme.desc: Louis Theroux heads to America to investigate one of the most controversial and captivating icons of recent times: gun-toting, self-described 'gay hillbilly' and 'Tiger King' Joe Exotic.

programme.title: Bangers & Cash
programme.desc: Ford Escort Mexico: Derek has sold everything from trucks to bicycles - but he can't remember the last time he auctioned off a two-seater plane.

programme.title: Bangers & Cash
programme.desc: Sunbeam Rapier: 100 motorbikes come in for auction from every era of the 20th century. Also, the team assess a 1965 Vanden Plas Princess with a four litre Rolls Royce engine.

programme.title: Abandoned Engineering
programme.desc: Defenders Of Liberty: A now silent site that played a pivotal role defending the U.S through the 20th century. Plus, a crumbling Italian fortress and a ghostly Ukrainian mansion.

programme.title: Abandoned Engineering
programme.desc: Space Plane: A juggernaut of Soviet engineering which was crucial to the international space race. Deserted Scottish coastal defences and a complex that's crucial to American history.

programme.title: World War Weird
